column1: C[rio: it's on bitch! make a move
C[rio: I'm off to a party, we'll continue this tomorrow. I like this as a first game on this site.
mladen: we can even analyse a game after we're done
rio: oh that would be nice. You can really see you've played a few games more than me.
rio: still good fun though.I haven't been playing this for long but it is really intriguing
rio: I think i've spelled that wrong :p
C[rio: This was way over my head....
mladen: so, generally...I'm not sure how the review works here
rio: first game here right? Played a lot before?
C[rio: first game here right? Played a lot before?
C[rio: pff i shouldn't play this no my phone.my big fingers keep fucking up stone placement :/
C[rio: sorry dude, i give in. looks like i was a bit over my head on this one. I see that you've risen 2 ranks in the meantime, so no surprise there :P
C[rio: Thank you for this game, I was in way over my head. Almost thought I could isolate you but I'm just not that good yet :P
C[rio: thanks for the game, good luck
C[rio: thanks for the game, good luck
C[rio: Thanks I hope we both learn something :)
C[rio: Oh damn, I'm sorry JustForFun, got a bit lost in my work... kinda forgot about this. Was a nice start though. You'd definitely beat me.
C[rio: wow my game really sucks...
C[dansan: :)  I wouldn't go that far.  And it is early yet.
C[rio: yeah well... I really don't play enough to really have some strategy to my game.
C[dansan: I'm in the same boat.  One rule of thumb I try to stick with is to get and maintain the initiative.  Easier said than done.
C[rio: haha yeah but you've got it now
C[dansan: I try, but play too rarely for the most part.
C[dansan: I'll be out of town and off the grid for a week, so I'll resume play next Friday.
C[dansan: Hey, paused the game to give you a bit more leeway to play. I'd hate to win by timeout.
C[rio: thanks man, sorry, been quite hectic at work.
C[rio: oh man you've so got me in that middle part. yeps, really my best game ever...
rio: right so now that we've gotten that over with...
C[dansan: Paused the game again for you. :) Absolutely hate timeouts.
C[rio: oh god I need to set alarm clocks or something. not that I'm beating you. not by a long shot

dansan: LOL Yeah, I realized yesterday that this game likely wouldn't be paused for the holiday and another game I'm on I almost timed out because it doesn't pause on weekends. Got to them both in time. :)
C[rio: that's it man I'm done!
rio: And I don't deserve that 28k. Should play more.

dansan: Definitely play more, but don't be hard on yourself. If I was better, I could give some decent advice. The only thing I might suggest is to do less battles and work more and getting territory.
C[dansan: The scoring is really hokey. Do you want to spend a couple of minutes to close up all the loose ends?
rio: it would just be embarrasing :P
rio: besides I'm still at work
C[dansan: Thanks for the game. Don't get discouraged.
dansan: It was closer than the score shows. There were several groups that could've gone either way and the difference was just a single stone placement.
rio: thanks, I appreciate that. Don't worry I won't quit on this game. I just whished there were some of my friends that played it.
rio: Any way it was a pleasure! See you next time
C[rio: Oh sorry man! I hate losing by timeout! IT was a rough week over here.
folly: Sorry to hear that. I wish claiming time outs was optional.
